config.weather_input: actuals (perfect-forecast ceiling; fair between rungs, flattering in absolute terms)

accuracy.note: MAE/RMSE/MAPE over all predicted hours; picked_* over each rung's chosen cheapest hours only. MAPE excludes hours with |actual| < 1.0 ct/kWh (prices cross zero).

paired_vs_lookup.note: mean_diff_ct = daily cost of the rung minus the lookup table, paired on the same test days; positive = the rung costs more. Sign-flip permutation test; t is descriptive, p_two_sided is the inference. mde_ct is the minimum detectable effect at 80% power, two-sided alpha 0.05.
